title: Introduction
excerpt: Learn more about Skeleton and how it can serve you.

title: Installation
excerpt: Learn how to install and setup Skeleton for your project.

excerpt: An introduction to the core concepts of Skeleton.

title: Core API
excerpt: Learn about the specific features Skeleton introduces to Tailwind.

title: Migrate from v2
excerpt: Learn how to migrate from Skeleton v2 to the latest release.

title: Migrate from v3
excerpt: Learn how to migrate from Skeleton v3 to the latest release.

title: Dark Mode
excerpt: Learn how to use Tailwind's dark mode feature for your Skeleton project.

title: Layouts
excerpt: Learn best practices for creating responsive layouts using semantic HTML and Tailwind.

title: Cookbook
excerpt: A collection of recipes for crafting interface features that utilize Skeleton primitives.

title: Themes
excerpt: The Skeleton theme system.

title: Colors
excerpt: The Skeleton color system.

title: Presets
excerpt: Canned styles for your interface elements.

title: Typography
excerpt: The Skeleton typography system.

title: Spacing
excerpt: Set a dynamic scale for application whitespace.

title: Iconography
excerpt: Learn how to integrate Lucide for iconography in Skeleton.

title: Badges
excerpt: Provides a robust set of non-interactive badge styles.

title: Buttons
excerpt: Provide a variety of button, including customizable sizes and types.

title: Cards
excerpt: Provides container elements that wrap and separate content.

title: Chips
excerpt: Provides a robust set of interactive chip styles.

title: Dividers
excerpt: Horizontal and vertical rule styling.

title: Forms and Inputs
excerpt: Various form and input styles.

title: Placeholders
excerpt: Provides "skeleton" placeholders that can display while content loads.

title: Tables
excerpt: Provides a set of styles for native HTML table elements.

title: Accordion
excerpt: Divide content into collapsible sections.

title: App Bar
excerpt: A header element for the top of your page layout.

title: Avatar
excerpt: An image with a fallback for representing the user.

title: Carousel
excerpt: Navigate through a collection of slides with controls and indicators.

title: Collapsible
excerpt: A container that can be expanded or collapsed to show or hide content.

title: Combobox
excerpt: A combobox is an input widget with an associated popup that enables users to select a value from a collection of possible values.

title: Date Picker
excerpt: Select dates from a calendar interface.

title: Dialog
excerpt: A modal dialog for displaying content and actions.

title: File Upload
excerpt: File upload dropzone and input patterns for selecting files.

title: Floating Panel
excerpt: A draggable, resizable floating panel with minimize/maximize controls.

title: Listbox
excerpt: Accessible listbox for single and multi selection.

title: Menu
excerpt: Accessible dropdown and context menus for actions and navigation.

title: Navigation
excerpt: Navigation patterns for apps (bar, rail, sidebar, toggle).

title: Pagination
excerpt: Client and server-side pagination controls.

title: Popover
excerpt: Small overlay panels positioned relative to a trigger.

title: Portal
excerpt: Renders children into a DOM node that exists outside the DOM hierarchy.

title: Progress - Circular
excerpt: Circular progress indicators for showing task progress.

title: Progress - Linear
excerpt: An indicator showing the progress or completion of a task.

title: Rating Group
excerpt: Rating Group allows users to rate something

title: Segmented Control
excerpt: Capture input for a limited set of options.

title: Slider
excerpt: Capture input from a range of values.

title: Steps
excerpt: Use steps to guide users through a multi-step process.

title: Switch
excerpt: Toggle between two states, such as on/off.

title: Tabs
excerpt: Use tabs to quickly switch between different views and pages.

title: Tags Input
excerpt: Allows input of multiple values.

title: Toast
excerpt: Display brief messages to users.

title: Toggle Group
excerpt: Grouped buttons for toggling option states.

title: Tooltip
excerpt: A floating label that appears on hover or focus, providing additional context.

title: Tree View
excerpt: Used to display hierarchical data.

title: Code Block
excerpt: Learn how to integrate Shiki, a beautiful yet powerful syntax highlighter.

title: Bits UI
excerpt: Flexible, unstyled, and accessible primitives that provide the foundation for building your own high-quality Svelte component library.

title: Melt UI
excerpt: An open-source Svelte library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

title: Radix UI
excerpt: Unstyled, accessible, open source React primitives for high-quality web apps and design systems.

title: Contribute
excerpt: Learn how to contribute to Skeleton.

title: LLMs
excerpt: Documentation for LLMs. Beep Boop.
